violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls have dust on them behind the food prep table.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand washing sink in the kitchen was found with a pizza pan and container of sliced cheese across the basin. Hand washing sinks should be easily accessible at all times.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. Logs associated with the HACCP procedures are not being maintained as stated in the HACCP plan. -Temperature log is not maintained for all areas vacuum sealed items are kept. Product temperatures and use by dates should be checked daily, per HACCP plan. -Product date/Label log is not being maintained. This should be completed daily, per HACCP plan. -Thermometer Validation log is not being maintained. This should be completed weekly, per HACCP plan.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
